keywords: how do i sign up for classes
answer: Rowan course registration is completed online through Self-Service Banner during the registration period. For Registration & Records help, contact the Registrar at registrar@rowan.edu or 856-256-4360.

keywords: what time does the registrar open
answer: The Registrar's office is open for in-person needs Monday through Friday, 8:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m.

keywords: how do i meet with an advisor
answer: For general advising questions, contact advise@rowan.edu. To set up an appointment with an advisor, call the ACE Center at 856-256-4459 or use Rowan Success Network.
For Financial Aid help, contact financialaid@rowan.edu. Rowan also offers ASK SUSAN for many financial-aid questions.
For billing and account questions, contact the Bursar's Office at bursar@rowan.edu or 856-256-4150.
Official transcripts can be requested through Student Self-Service Banner or through the National Student Clearinghouse. For transcript or records help, contact registrar@rowan.edu.

If you are having login trouble, first double-check that you are using your @rowan.edu email and the correct password. If the issue continues, contact the appropriate Rowan support office or your system administrator.
